step_by_step_thinking:
Tool Call: retrieve("effect of case-mix reimbursement on process-oriented care delivery")

Retrieved Documents: 32 documents

Your final sentence must end with \boxed{{A}} or \boxed{{B}} or \boxed{{C}}.
Based on the retrieved evidence, case-mix based reimbursement promotes process-oriented care by encouraging care coordination, efficiency, and standardized pathways for treating specific conditions—a key feature of process-oriented delivery. While critiques highlight potential risks like patient selection bias and unequal impacts on vulnerable populations, the majority of available evidence demonstrates clear links between bundled payment models and structured, protocol-driven care delivery systems. \boxed{{A}}
